overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence depicting a slow walk through a rain-soaked Victorian residential street at night, likely from Red Dead Redemption 2. The camera moves past an ornate iron fence and Spanish moss-draped trees, illuminated by warm vintage street lamps reflecting off wet cobblestones.

scene_state.functional_zone: Victorian residential sidewalk with ornate iron fencing

events.description: passing the vintage street lamp on the right, moving from near to mid distance

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the wet sidewalk next to an ornate iron fence, passing under Spanish moss

entered.detail: black wrought iron fence with decorative patterns running along the property line
square stone pillars marking the entrance to the property
two-story wooden Victorian residence with wraparound porch and warm interior lights
cast iron street lamp emitting warm yellow-orange light through the rain
thick hanging moss draping from oak branches overhead, swaying in the rain
rain-slicked cobblestone sidewalk reflecting the street lamp glow

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-drenched Victorian residential sidewalk at night. The camera moves forward alongside an ornate iron fence, passing a warm vintage street lamp on the right. Spanish moss hangs thickly from overhead branches, creating a canopy that blocks most of the sky, while heavy rain falls steadily onto the reflective cobblestone path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open Victorian residential street with distant lamp posts

events.description: passing the fence line into the open residential street, revealing more of the road ahead
moving away from the main street lamp into darker, more open area with reduced visibility

agents.ego_description: continuing down the open street past the Victorian house, moving toward distant lights in the fog

entered.detail: row of vintage street lamps receding into the foggy distance along the road

segments.scene_description: Having passed the iron fence, the scene opens into a wider residential street. The Victorian house is now fully visible on the left with its porch lights glowing warmly. The camera moves toward distant street lamps that fade into the rainy fog, while the heavy rain continues to fall on the cobblestone road, creating ripples and reflections in the dim light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-soaked Victorian sidewalk that gradually opens into a wider, fog-shrouded residential street. It begins by gliding alongside an ornate iron fence under a dense canopy of Spanish moss, with a warm vintage street lamp casting a glow over the reflective cobblestones. As the camera moves past the fence, the view expands to reveal a Victorian house on the left with warmly lit porches. The scene then shifts toward the center of the road, where the heavy rain creates ripples in the dim light before the path leads toward distant street lamps that fade into a thick, rainy fog.
